activeGoal: 修复两个前端集成问题：1）AI反馈结束后发送按钮仍为灰色，导致无法继续在当前会话中追加提问；2）AI反馈内容显示不流畅，每次增量更新会导致气泡整体刷新，需要改为在同一气泡内逐字流式显示，并支持 Markdown 渲染。

tasks.title: 修复两个前端集成问题：1）AI反馈结束后发送按钮仍为灰色，导致无法继续在当前会话中追加提问；2）AI反馈内容显示不流畅，每次增量更新会导致气泡整体刷新，需要改为在同一气泡内逐字流式显示，并支持 Markdown 渲染。
tasks.summary: Fast-track fix completed in existing sidepanel/background modules. Restored follow-up send availability after completed responses, kept active session continuity by syncing live run state back to background storage, stabilized assistant bubble identity for incremental updates, and rendered assistant content as Markdown. Validation: npm test (102/102), npm run typecheck, npm run build in extension workspace.

qa.summary: Validated TASK-104 on commit 7cf68e050f3809610207d44cb62a9f669c38a4df. Reviewed sidepanel/background changes and targeted tests covering send-button re-enable after completion, waiting_for_answer not treated as composer-busy, stable assistant message identity across deltas/final result, same-bubble progressive rendering, Markdown rendering via ReactMarkdown, and SYNC_RUN_STATE persistence. Verification executed in extension workspace: npx vitest run src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts src/background/index.test.ts (64 passed), npm test (102 passed), npm run typecheck, npm run build. No defects found. Note: TASK-104 lacks architectureElementId traceability in project graph, but automated coverage exists for touched modules.
